hero_subtitle: SFTY helps executives in VASPs oversee provider usage, monitor outputs and dependency risk, and maintain an audit-ready governance framework across compliance workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Provider governance lacks clear operational control
problem_description: Executives face challenges managing multiple compliance providers without a unified view of their outputs or usage risks. This fragmentation creates gaps in audit readiness, weakens decision traceability, and increases dependency risk across compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, usage data, decision logs and audit evidence into a unified control layer so leadership can oversee provider performance, compliance risk and operational governance clearly.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to governance controls
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider results through rules review, risk assessment, case management, decision recording and evidence preservation for clear compliance governance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Clear executive control
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that connects compliance outputs into audit-ready decisions, evidence and governance for clearer risk oversight and operational visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY helps VASP executives govern provider usage, preserve audit-ready evidence and support bank due diligence within scalable, controlled compliance deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support governance controls for compliance providers
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how provider outputs are monitored and reviewed
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports compliance governance
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare governance controls for managing multi-provider risk
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance layer that reduces operational risk, strengthens auditability, and enhances visibility across provider workflows and compliance decisions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY govern multiple compliance providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects outputs from various compliance providers into structured workflows with integrated policies, decision logs, case management, and provider usage monitoring to control dependency risk.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories, regulatory rule change records and evidence packages to support audit-readiness and traceable governance of compliance activities.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs without disrupting current compliance technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace providers or sit above them?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but sits above them as a governance and orchestration layer connecting their outputs into auditable, rule-driven workflows.
final_title: Govern provider outputs with audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports executive oversight of provider usage, risk governance and structured compliance workflows in VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
